title: UnlimitedItems
description: A Mod that allows you to get one Item unlimited
body:
# ♾️ Unlimited Items Mod

**Unlimited Items** is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that extends the **"Infinity"** enchantment system to **all** items in the game!
**It may also work for other 1.21 versions, but the mod is programmed for 1.21.11.**

## ✨ Features
* **Infinite Use:** Any item enchanted with "Infinity" is **not consumed** when used, placed, or thrown.

* **Works on EVERYTHING:**

* 🔮 **Throwable Items:** Ender Pearls, Snowballs, Wind Charges, Potions.

* 🍔 **Food & Drink:** Golden Apples, Steaks, Water Bottles.

* 🛡️ **Entities:** Armor Stands, Boats, Minecarts.

* 🧱 **Blocks:** Building blocks, redstone components, etc.

* 🚀 **Fireworks:** Perfect for endless elytra flights.

* **Safe & Stable:**

* Prevents inventory item duplication (when moving/clicking).

* Prevents crashes when dropping infinite stacks.

* Compatible with various 1.21.11 server versions (including custom servers like 1.21.11).

## 🎮 Commands

This mod adds useful commands to directly apply enchantments (requires OP privileges):

* `/unlimiteditems enchant`

* Instantly enchants the item in your hand with "Infinity".

* `/unlimiteditems book`

* Gives you an enchanted book with "Infinity" that you can use at the anvil.


* * `/unlimiteditems disenchant`

* Removes all enchantments from the item in your hand.

## 📦 Installation

1. Make sure you have the **Fabric Loader** and the **Fabric API** installed for Minecraft 1.21.11.

2. Upload the `.jar` file to your `mods` folder.

3. Start the game/server.

---
**Enjoy unlimited items!**
